prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 13359→13083→11443→20208→20728。2024 年贵州省首次实施新高考（物理类/历史类），位次体系发生重大变化，物理类位次从 2023 年理科 11443 后移至 20208，2025 年进一步微移至 20728，近两年基本稳定在 20700 附近；该校在贵州省理科/物理类招生计划：2021 年 54 人、2022 年 54 人、2023 年 56 人、2024 年 58 人、2025 年 56 人；2026 年计划大幅扩招至 76 人，较 2025 年增加 20 人，增幅约 35.7%，显著缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 113 名，近年排名在 99–113 之间波动，整体处于中上水平；近年声誉平稳，无重大负面舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第 50 位（较热），2023 年曾进入年度前十（高热），短视频平台有一定关注度；第五轮学科评估数据中未收录该校 A 类学科信息，但学校以交通运输工程、航海技术等为特色，在航运领域具有显著行业影响力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类等工科专业社会热度持续较高；贵州省 2026 年高考总人数约 29.9 万，较 2025 年 29.7 万基本持平，物理类考生估算约 20.6 万，竞争格局稳定；该校位于辽宁省大连市，非本省院校，无本地招生倾斜；贵州省招生人数占比较小，2025 年约 1.5%，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 20728、2026 年大幅扩招 35.7%（竞争显著缓解）以及考生规模基本持平等因素；考虑学校 211 层次和工科专业热度对报考的支撑作用，小幅上调 30 名，预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 25200 名，区间 24700–25700 名。

一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术等）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026 年物理类大幅扩招 35.7%，位次预计明显后移至约 25200 名，报考难度较 2025 年显著降低。位次在预测区间 24700–25700 内的考生可重点考虑二档专业（机械类、交通运输类、数学类等）作为稳妥选择，位次优于 24700 的考生可冲刺一档热门专业（计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类），位次在 25700 之后的考生可以三档专业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category was approximately 13359→13083→11443→20208→20728. In 2024, Guizhou Province implemented the new college entrance examination (Physics Category/History Category) for the first time, causing a major shift in the ranking system. The Physics Category ranking moved from 11443 in 2023 (Science) to 20208 in 2024, and further slightly adjusted to 20728 in 2025, stabilizing around 20700 in recent two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Guizhou Province for Science/Physics Category: 54 in 2021, 54 in 2022, 56 in 2023, 58 in 2024, 56 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 76, an increase of 20 compared to 2025, an increase of about 35.7%, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in 2026 approximately 113th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 99 and 113, overall at an upper-middle level; recent reputation stable, no major negative public opinion incidents; Douyin (TikTok) popularity total ranking 50th (relatively hot), once entered the top ten in 2023 (high heat), with a certain level of attention on short video platforms; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include information on A-level disciplines of this university, but the school is characterized by transportation engineering, navigation technology, etc., with significant industry influence in the shipping field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, etc., continue to have high social popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Guizhou Province is about 299,000, roughly the same as 297,000 in 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 206,000, maintaining a stable competitive landscape; the university is located in Dalian City, Liaoning Province, not a local institution, with no local enrollment bias; the proportion of enrollment in Guizhou Province is relatively small, about 1.5% in 2025, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 20728, the significant enrollment expansion of 35.7% in 2026 (significantly easing competition), and the roughly stable number of candidates; taking into account the support of the university's 211 level and the popularity of engineering majors for applications, a slight upward adjustment of 30 places is made, predicting the minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category to be about 25200, with a range of 24700–25700.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, etc.)
- Transportation (Transportation, Logistics Engineering, Traffic Engineering, etc.)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)
- Traffic Management
- Management Science and Engineering (Information Management and Information Systems, Big Data Management and Application, E-commerce, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Applied Physics
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Financial Management)
- Financial Engineering
- Supply Chain Management
- Logistics Management
- Public Administration (Public Affairs Management, Administrative Management, Social Work, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category sees a significant enrollment expansion of 35.7%, with the ranking expected to noticeably shift back to about 25200, making admission significantly easier compared to 2025. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 24700–25700 can focus on Tier 2 majors (Mechanical, Transportation, Mathematics, etc.) as a safe choice; those with rankings better than 24700 can aim for Tier 1 popular majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, etc.); candidates with rankings after 25700 can use Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 113 名，近年排名稳定在 99–113 之间；近年声誉平稳，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第 50 位（较热），学校整体关注度处于中等偏上水平；第五轮学科评估数据中未收录该校 A 类学科信息；学校以工科和航海为特色，文科专业（法学、英语、公共管理类）非其传统强势领域。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 3597、2026 年招生计划持平、历史类考生小幅增长约 2.9%（竞争略加剧）以及 2023 年断档后持续回升的趋势；考虑考生增加带来的竞争加剧，小幅上调竞争难度（位次前移 30 名），预测 2026 年历史类最低位次约 3567 名，区间 3067–4067 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Arts/History Category were approximately 1857→1771→9769→3823→3597. A significant gap occurred in 2023 (9769th), recovered to 3823 in 2024, and further rebounded to 3597 in 2025, showing a steady recovery trend in the past two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Guizhou Province for Arts/History Category: 9 students each year from 2021 to 2023, 10 students each in 2024 and 2025; the 2026 plan is 10 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 113th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking between 99 and 113 in recent years; reputation has been stable recently, with no major negative public opinion; ranked 50th in overall Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with overall attention at an upper-middle level; no A-class discipline information from the fifth round of discipline evaluation was included; the university is characterized by engineering and navigation, with liberal arts majors (Law, English, Public Administration) not being its traditional strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Law major remains high, while English and Public Administration majors are stable; the estimated number of History Category examinees in Guizhou Province in 2026 is about 92,700, an increase of approximately 2.9% from 90,100 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition due to the small growth in examinee numbers; the university is located in Dalian City, Liaoning Province, not a local institution; the enrollment number in Guizhou is small (9–10 students per year), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 3597, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a small increase of about 2.9% in History Category examinees (slightly intensified competition), and the continuous recovery trend after the 2023 gap; considering the intensified competition due to the increase in examinees, the competition difficulty is slightly raised (ranking moved forward by 30 places), predicting the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 to be approximately 3567, with a range of 3067–4067.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Public Administration (Public Service Management, Administrative Management, Social Work).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The 2026 History Category enrollment plan is unchanged from 2025, but with a small increase in examinee numbers, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward to about 3567. Examinees with rankings within the predicted range of 3067–4067 are advised to focus on the Tier 2 English major as the main choice; those with rankings better than 3067 can aim for the Tier 1 Law major, while those with rankings after 4067 can use the Tier 3 Public Administration major as a safety option.
